name: Raidraptor - Wild Vulture
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ワイルド・ヴァルチャー
desc: During your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 2 "Raidraptor" monsters from your hand and/or Graveyard whose total Levels equal 6.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 2 "Raidraptor" monsters from your hand and/or Graveyard whose total Levels equal 6.
eff: During your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 2 "Raidraptor" monsters from your hand and/or Graveyard whose total Levels equal 6.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Activates during the turn in which it was Special Summoned
